title: System Error
body: This application has performed an illegal operation and will be shut down.

title: Fatal Error
body: A fatal exception has occurred at 0x0028C001.

title: Application Error
body: Runtime Error! Program has generated errors and will be closed by Windows.

title: Warning
body: Insufficient system resources exist to complete the requested service.

title: System Restore
body: The system has recovered from a serious error.

body: Are you sure you want to terminate the current application?
